title: Ledger Scrolls Pointer
description: Tagged union of pointer kinds. Canonical kinds match registry/spec/format.md and the live on-chain registry. Legacy kinds are deprecated aliases retained for old documents only.

oneOf.title: UTxO Inline Datum Bytes (v1)
oneOf.description: Bytes stored in a Cardano UTxO inline datum (Standard Scroll / LS-LOCK). See registry/spec/cardano-utxo-datum.md for the datum encoding.

oneOf.title: CIP-25 Pages (v1)
oneOf.description: Bytes stored as CIP-25 (label 721) page NFTs plus manifest (Legacy Scroll / LS-PAGES).

oneOf.title: URL
oneOf.description: Off-chain mirror; bytes remain verifiable via the entry sha256.

oneOf.title: UTxO Locked Bytes (deprecated alias)
oneOf.description: Deprecated: superseded by utxo-inline-datum-bytes-v1. Do not emit in new documents.

oneOf.title: Asset Manifest (deprecated alias)
oneOf.description: Deprecated: superseded by cip25-pages-v1. Do not emit in new documents.
